scripts.dev:auto-open: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*next*start-server.js*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"; start http://localhost:3000; node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*next*start-server.js*' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"; node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev
